optics.notes: One of the components targeted by Ukrainian manufacturers due to high markup costs

optical_fiber.origin: Still imported (primarily from China - Hubei province)
optical_fiber.notes: Chemical process not yet localized in Ukraine

batteries.note: Research indicates ongoing component independence efforts

foreign_dependence.description: Components still dependent on Chinese imports
items: Chemical manufacturing plants for optical fiber
foreign_dependence.statistics: Only 5% of Ukrainian Council of Defense Industry members report not using Chinese components
foreign_dependence.risk: China could shut down global drone industry for a year according to Pentagon analysis
